---
title: "Case studies"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)

cs <- read_csv("data/processed/case_studies_public.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

fmt <- function(label, value) {
  value <- ifelse(is.na(value) | value == "", "—", value)
  # preserve newlines as <br> in the rendered HTML
  value <- gsub("\n", "<br>", htmlEscape(value))
  paste0("<p><b>", label, "</b><br>", value, "</p>")
}

clean_multiselect <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", x)
  x <- gsub("\\s*;\\s*", "; ", x)   # normalise semicolons
  x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x)         # normalise whitespace
  trimws(x)
}

format_years_active <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", trimws(x))

  vapply(x, function(one) {
    if (one == "") return("—")

    parts <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(one, "\\s*;\\s*")))
    parts <- parts[parts != ""]

    if (length(parts) >= 2 && all(grepl("^\\d{4}$", parts))) {
      paste0(min(as.integer(parts)), "–", max(as.integer(parts)))
    } else {
      gsub("\\s*;\\s*", "; ", one)
    }
  }, character(1))
}

maturity_short <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", x)
  trimws(sub(":.*$", "", x))
}

purpose_short <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_multiselect(x)

  vapply(x, function(one) {
    if (is.na(one) || one == "") return("—")

    parts <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(one, ";\\s*")))
    parts <- parts[parts != ""]

    # keep only the label before the colon, for each selected option
    parts <- sub(":.*$", "", parts)
    parts <- trimws(parts)

    paste(parts, collapse = "; \n")
  }, character(1))
}

ai_display <- function(x) {
  x <- clean_multiselect(x)

  vapply(x, function(one) {
    if (is.na(one) || one == "") return("—")

    parts <- trimws(unlist(strsplit(one, ";\\s*")))
    parts <- parts[parts != ""]

    paste(parts, collapse = "; \n")   # each AI type on a new line
  }, character(1))
}

get_levels <- function(x) {
  x <- x[!is.na(x) & x != ""]
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "\\s*;\\s*"))
  parts <- trimws(parts)
  parts <- parts[parts != ""]
  sort(unique(parts))
}

if (nrow(cs) == 0) {
  tags$p("No case studies are currently published.")
} else {

  # ---- DETAILS PANEL  ----
  details <- pmap_chr(
    cs %>%
      transmute(
        purpose,
        statistical_domains,
        gsbpm_phases,
        ai_types,
        years_active,
        maturity,
        business_need,
        description,
        benefits,
        challenges,
        personal_sensitive_data,
        governance_measures,
        ethics_note,
        links
      ),
    function(purpose, statistical_domains, gsbpm_phases, ai_types, years_active, maturity,
             business_need, description, benefits, challenges,
             personal_sensitive_data, governance_measures, ethics_note, links) {

      # clickable links (robust parsing)
      links_html <- links

      if (!is.na(links_html) && nzchar(trimws(links_html))) {

        x <- gsub("[\r\n\t]+", " ", links_html)
        x <- gsub("\\s+", " ", x)
        x <- trimws(x)

        urls <- unlist(regmatches(
          x,
          gregexpr("(https?://[^[:space:]\\)\\]\\}<>\"']+|www\\.[^[:space:]\\)\\]\\}<>\"']+)", x, perl = TRUE)
        ))

        urls <- unique(urls)

        # strip trailing punctuation / brackets
        urls <- gsub("[\\.,;:!\\?]+$", "", urls)
        urls <- gsub("[\\)\\]\\}]+$", "", urls)
        urls <- gsub("[\"']+$", "", urls)
        urls <- unique(urls)

        if (length(urls) == 0) {
          links_html <- "—"
        } else {
          hrefs <- ifelse(grepl("^www\\.", urls), paste0("https://", urls), urls)

          links_html <- paste0(
            "<ul>",
            paste0(
              "<li><a href='", htmlEscape(hrefs),
              "' target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'>",
              htmlEscape(urls),
              "</a></li>",
              collapse = ""
            ),
            "</ul>"
          )
        }

      } else {
        links_html <- "—"
      }

      paste0(
        "<div class='cs-details'>",
          fmt("Purpose of AI initiative", clean_multiselect(purpose)),
          fmt("Business need", business_need),
          fmt("Description", description),
          fmt("AI type(s)", clean_multiselect(ai_types)),
          fmt("Statistical domain(s)", clean_multiselect(statistical_domains)),
          fmt("GSBPM phase(s)", clean_multiselect(gsbpm_phases)),
          fmt("Maturity", maturity),
          fmt("Benefits", benefits),
          fmt("Challenges / risks", challenges),
          fmt("Personal / sensitive data", personal_sensitive_data),
          fmt("Governance / ethical measures", clean_multiselect(governance_measures)),
          fmt("Ethics / bias / accountability note", ethics_note),
          "<p><b>Links</b><br>", links_html, "</p>",
        "</div>"
      )
    }
  )

  # ---- MAIN TABLE  ----
  cs_tbl <- cs %>%
    transmute(
      Details = "+",
      `Title` = title,
      `Lead organisation` = lead_organisation,
      `Purpose of AI initiative` = purpose_short(purpose),
      `AI type(s)` = ai_display(ai_types),
      `Years active` = format_years_active(years_active),
      `Maturity` = maturity_short(maturity),

      # hidden full columns for filtering (tokenised)
      purpose_full = purpose_short(purpose),
      ai_full      = clean_multiselect(ai_types),

      `_details` = details
    )

  # Derive column indices programmatically (0-based for DataTables)
  # This means adding/reordering columns in cs_tbl will never silently break the filters
  col_names <- names(cs_tbl)
  idx <- function(name) which(col_names == name) - 1L

  idx_maturity     <- idx("Maturity")
  idx_purpose_full <- idx("purpose_full")
  idx_ai_full      <- idx("ai_full")
  idx_details      <- idx("_details")

  purpose_levels  <- get_levels(cs_tbl$purpose_full)
  ai_levels       <- get_levels(cs_tbl$ai_full)
  maturity_levels <- sort(unique(na.omit(cs_tbl$Maturity)))

  # ---- FILTER CONTROLS  ----
  controls <- htmltools::tags$div(
    class = "dt-filters",

    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "dt-filter",
      htmltools::tags$label(`for` = "f_purpose", "Purpose of AI"),
      htmltools::tags$select(
        id = "f_purpose", class = "dt-filter-select",
        htmltools::tags$option(value = "", "All"),
        lapply(purpose_levels, \(v) htmltools::tags$option(value = v, v))
      )
    ),

    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "dt-filter",
      htmltools::tags$label(`for` = "f_ai", "AI type(s)"),
      htmltools::tags$select(
        id = "f_ai", class = "dt-filter-select",
        htmltools::tags$option(value = "", "All"),
        lapply(ai_levels, \(v) htmltools::tags$option(value = v, v))
      )
    ),

    htmltools::tags$div(
      class = "dt-filter",
      htmltools::tags$label(`for` = "f_maturity", "Maturity"),
      htmltools::tags$select(
        id = "f_maturity", class = "dt-filter-select",
        htmltools::tags$option(value = "", "All"),
        lapply(maturity_levels, \(v) htmltools::tags$option(value = v, v))
      )
    )
  )

  # Column indices injected from R so they stay correct if columns are ever reordered
  callback <- JS(paste0("
    // Column indices (set by R at render time)
    var IDX_MATURITY     = ", idx_maturity, ";
    var IDX_PURPOSE_FULL = ", idx_purpose_full, ";
    var IDX_AI_FULL      = ", idx_ai_full, ";
    var IDX_DETAILS      = ", idx_details, ";

    // Expand/collapse row details
    table.on('click', 'td.details-control', function () {
      var tr = $(this).closest('tr');
      var row = table.row(tr);

      if (row.child.isShown()) {
        row.child.hide();
        tr.removeClass('shown');
        $(this).html('+');
      } else {
        var d = row.data();
        var detailsHtml = d[IDX_DETAILS];
        row.child(detailsHtml).show();
        tr.addClass('shown');
        $(this).html('\u2212');
      }
    });

    function escapeRegex(text) {
      return text.replace(/[-\\/^$*+?.()|[\\]{}]/g, '\\\\$&');
    }

    function applyTokenSearch(colIdx, val) {
      if (!val) {
        table.column(colIdx).search('');
      } else {
        var re = '(^|;\\\\s*)' + escapeRegex(val) + '(;|$)';
        table.column(colIdx).search(re, true, false);
      }
    }

    function applyExactSearch(colIdx, val) {
      if (!val) {
        table.column(colIdx).search('');
      } else {
        table.column(colIdx).search('^' + escapeRegex(val) + '$', true, false);
      }
    }

    $('#f_purpose').off('change').on('change', function() {
      applyTokenSearch(IDX_PURPOSE_FULL, $(this).val());
      table.draw();
    });

    $('#f_ai').off('change').on('change', function() {
      applyTokenSearch(IDX_AI_FULL, $(this).val());
      table.draw();
    });

    $('#f_maturity').off('change').on('change', function() {
      applyExactSearch(IDX_MATURITY, $(this).val());
      table.draw();
    });
  "))

  dt <- DT::datatable(
    cs_tbl,
    rownames = FALSE,
    extensions = c("FixedHeader"),
    filter = "none",
    selection = "none",
    callback = callback,
    width = "100%",
    escape = c(rep(TRUE, ncol(cs_tbl) - 1), FALSE),

    options = list(
      dom = "lftip",
      pageLength = 25,
      autoWidth = FALSE,
      scrollX = FALSE,
      scrollY = "600px",
      fixedHeader = list(header = TRUE, headerOffset = 60),

      columnDefs = list(
        list(targets = 0, className = "details-control", orderable = FALSE),

        # hide full filter cols (keep searchable)
        list(targets = c(idx_purpose_full, idx_ai_full), visible = FALSE, searchable = TRUE),

        # hide details html col (not searchable)
        list(targets = idx_details, visible = FALSE, searchable = FALSE)
      )
    )
  )

  htmltools::tagList(controls, dt)
}
```
